old_value: {"id":"smallhold-97xw","title":"DNS rebinding bypasses SSRF checks","description":"is_private_host() in federation.rs only checks hostname strings and parsed IP literals from the URL, but never resolves DNS and checks the resulting IP. An attacker-controlled domain that resolves to 127.0.0.1 or 169.254.x.x bypasses validate_outbound_url(). Affects fetch_actor(), resolve_webfinger(), and all outbound delivery in deliver_one(). Fix: resolve the hostname to IP(s) and re-check is_private_host() on each resolved address before connecting, or use a custom reqwest DNS resolver that rejects private IPs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T18:23:31.242694829Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T18:23:31.242694829Z","labels":["codereview"]}
